message:
fix(fcp-mesh): correct max_symbols in multi-node transfer test

The SymbolRequest was created with max_symbols=2 but the missing_hint
vector could contain up to 4 entries (meta.source_symbols). This
violated the validation in symbol_request.rs that requires
hints.len() <= max_symbols.

Changed max_symbols from hardcoded 2 to meta.source_symbols to match
the actual number of source symbols in the test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
